info.title: MeroAlpha Data Platform API
info.description: Developer-first NEPSE market-data API for clean datasets, provenance, and MCP integrations.

get.summary: OpenAPI 3.1 contract for REST, playground, and MCP integrations.
get.description: Standard machine-readable API contract for MeroAlpha integration points.

get.summary: Supported technical indicator specs, defaults, params, and output columns.
get.description: Supported technical indicator specs, defaults, params, and output columns.

data.name: Simple Moving Average
data.description: Rolling arithmetic mean of close prices.

presets.name: Trend Basic
presets.description: Starter bundle for trend-following moving-average and MACD indicators.

get.summary: Compute symbol-scoped daily technical indicators from historical OHLCV rows.
get.description: Compute symbol-scoped daily technical indicators from historical OHLCV rows.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: adjusted
parameters.description: Return adjusted price rows when available.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Named indicator bundle such as trend_basic, momentum_basic, volatility_basic, or full_basic.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Trend Basic
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Starter bundle: SMA, EMA, and MACD.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Momentum Basic
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Starter bundle: RSI and stochastic oscillator.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Volatility Basic
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Starter bundle: ATR and Bollinger Bands.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Full Basic
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Starter bundle across trend, momentum, and volatility.

parameters.name: indicators
parameters.description: Comma-separated indicator specs such as sma:20,rsi:14,macd:12:26:9.

x-meroalpha-playground-params.name: period
x-meroalpha-playground-params.description: Playground helper for date selection; API clients may send date/from/to directly.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Single Day
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use the date parameter only.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 7 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 30 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Custom Range
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use explicit from/to parameters.

get.summary: Supported market regime detection methods, NEPSE daily profiles, and neutral market-context labels.
get.description: Supported market regime detection methods, NEPSE daily profiles, and neutral market-context labels.

data.name: Indicator-Based Regime
data.description: Rule-based regime detection from ADX, ATR, Bollinger Bands, and EMAs.

profiles.name: NEPSE Daily
profiles.description: Daily OHLCV profile tuned for end-of-day NEPSE market data.

market_contexts.description: Analytical market context only; not investment advice.

get.summary: Compute symbol-scoped daily market regimes from historical OHLCV rows. Market context is analytical only and is not investment advice.
get.description: Compute symbol-scoped daily market regimes from historical OHLCV rows. Market context is analytical only and is not investment advice.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: adjusted
parameters.description: Use adjusted daily prices when true.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Regime detection method: indicator, hmm, or ensemble.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Ensemble
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Default blend of indicator and HMM regime methods.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Indicator
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Rule-based detector using ADX, bands, volatility, and EMAs.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: HMM
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Statistical detector from daily close-to-close returns.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Regime profile. The initial supported profile is nepse_daily.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: NEPSE Daily
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: End-of-day OHLCV profile tuned for NEPSE daily data.

market_context.label: directional_uptrend_context
market_context.description: Analytical market context only; not investment advice.

x-meroalpha-playground-params.name: period
x-meroalpha-playground-params.description: Playground helper for date selection; API clients may send date/from/to directly.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Single Day
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use the date parameter only.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 7 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 30 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Custom Range
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use explicit from/to parameters.

get.summary: Historical daily OHLCV rows with source metadata.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: adjusted
parameters.description: Return adjusted price rows when available.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Values above the endpoint maximum are clamped.

x-meroalpha-playground-params.name: period
x-meroalpha-playground-params.description: Playground helper for date selection; API clients may send date/from/to directly.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Single Day
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use the date parameter only.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 7 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Past 30 Days
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use a generated from/to range ending on the selected date.

x-meroalpha-param-options.label: Custom Range
x-meroalpha-param-options.description: Use explicit from/to parameters.
